source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit that adds q20 PWL reciprocal-divider reduced-replica recost support and should wait until the q20 PWL reciprocal-divider L1 PPA item is merged.

requested_items.objective: Recost the measured q20 PWL reciprocal-divider composed dual-stream attention wrapper at the area-fit replica count and measured wrapper clock.

expected_result.reason: The measured q20 PWL reciprocal-divider datapath is a high-cost but physically embodied softmax boundary; recost it to keep the Llama7B frontier comparison honest.
